notes: HAR-405 captures live Shopify Admin GraphQL 2026-04 staged upload target metadata for IMAGE, FILE, VIDEO, and MODEL_3D without uploading bytes. The local proxy keeps URL/resourceUrl and signature-bound parameter values as inert `shopify-draft-proxy.local` placeholders, while matching the captured staged target count, userErrors shape, parameter order, parameter names, and stable non-secret form constants.

expectedDifferences.reason: Shopify returns signed external storage URLs; the proxy intentionally returns inert local placeholder URLs.
Shopify returns signed external storage resource URLs; the proxy intentionally returns inert local placeholder resource URLs.
The IMAGE key embeds Shopify store and random storage path details; the proxy returns an inert local upload key.
The IMAGE x-goog-date is generated by Shopify storage signing; the proxy returns a deterministic placeholder.
The IMAGE x-goog-credential is part of Shopify storage signing; the proxy returns a deterministic placeholder.
The IMAGE x-goog-signature is a live storage signature; the proxy returns a deterministic placeholder.
The IMAGE policy is a live storage policy; the proxy returns a deterministic placeholder.
The FILE key embeds Shopify store and random storage path details; the proxy returns an inert local upload key.
The FILE x-goog-date is generated by Shopify storage signing; the proxy returns a deterministic placeholder.
The FILE x-goog-credential is part of Shopify storage signing; the proxy returns a deterministic placeholder.
The FILE x-goog-signature is a live storage signature; the proxy returns a deterministic placeholder.
The FILE policy is a live storage policy; the proxy returns a deterministic placeholder.
VIDEO target values are storage-account, key, policy, and signature material; the proxy returns inert local placeholders.
MODEL_3D target values are storage-account, key, policy, and signature material; the proxy returns inert local placeholders.
